title: OFLC Wage Data Downloads | Flag.dol.gov
content:
## OFLC Wage Data Downloads
Last Updated: August 20th, 2025
Use this page to access current and historical wage data files. Each file includes data for the entire country as well as geographic and occupational information tables.

## Current Wage Data Files
2025-2026 Wage Files (.zip, 11MB)

## Historical Wage Data Files
2024-2025 Wage Files (.zip, 12MB)
2023-2024 Wage Files (.zip, 13MB)
2022-2023 Wage Files (.zip, 12MB)
2021-2022 Wage Files (.zip, 11MB)
2020-2021 Wage Files (.zip, 11MB)
2019-2020 Wage Files (.zip, 9MB)
